title: Sweet Korean Bowl
description: A sweet and savory Korean-inspired bowl made with dense sweet bread and a variety of toppings.
instructions: Slice the dense sweet bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Brush the bread slices with sesame oil and toast in the oven for 5 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of soy sauce over medium heat.
Add the cubed sweet potatoes and cook until caramelized, about 10-12 minutes.
Stir in honey and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Assemble the bowls by placing toasted bread on the bottom, followed by sweet potato mixture, green onions, and toasted sesame seeds (if using).
